ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR MAR-11-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE JAN-15-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF SEMEYON GOFMAN'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AS PREVAILING PARTY IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS THE PREVAILING PARTY UNDER CCP SEC. 1032. THEREFORE, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER ATTORNEY'S FEES PROVIDED FOR BY STATUTE UNDER CCP SEC. 1033.5(A)(10). PURSUANT TO DORAN V. NORTH STATE GROCERY ((2006) 137 CAL.APP.4TH 484), PLAINTIFF IS NOT ENTITLED TO RECOVER ATTORNEY'S FEES UNDER THE LABOR CODE BECAUSE THE PLAIN LANGUAGE OF THE STATUTES REQUIRES A DETERMINATION OF LIABILITY. HOWEVER, THE PLAIN LANGUAGE OF GOVT. CODE SEC. 12965(B) DOES NOT REQUIRE SUCH A SHOWING. UNDER GOVT. CODE SEC. 12965(B), THE COURT IS GIVEN DISCRETION TO AWARD REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES TO THE PREVAILING PARTY. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF REASONABLE COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,000. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Tax And/Or Strike Deft'S Costs
Off Calendar May-21-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Svetlana Shirinova, Esq., 415.947.0703, for plaintiff Semeyon Gofman.
Sherry Matta, Esq., 818.509.7272, for Defendants Whittier Enterprise LLC and Alex Meseonznik.

RULING: No argument. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SEMEYON GOFMAN's Motion To Tax And/Or Strike Defendant's Costs is granted and denied in part. The court denies the motion as to the $570 filing and reporter fees. The court grants the motion as to the courtcall charge. That is a proscribed telephone charge within the meaning of CCP 1033.5(b)(3). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Carol Karen #8189.

Notice Of Motion For Attorney Fees
Off Calendar May-21-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Svetlana Shirinova, Esq., 415.947.0703, for plaintiff Semeyon Gofman.
Sherry Matta, Esq., 818.509.7272, for Defendants Whittier Enterprise LLC and Alex Meseonznik.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTs WHITTIER ENTERPRISE LLC, and ALEX MESEONZNIK's Motion For Attorney Fees is denied. The court determines that the motion is timely under CRC 3.1702 because neither plaintiff nor the clerk of the court served a notice of entry of dismissal on plaintiff. Accordingly, the 180-day time period never commenced. The court denies fees under Labor Code sec. 218.5 because defendant fails to demonstrate that plaintiff commenced the action in bad faith. The court denies fees under Gov't Code sec. 12965 because defendant fails to demonstrate that the FEHA claims were frivolous. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Carol Karen #8189.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SEMEYON GOFMAN'S Motion To Tax And/Or Strike Defendant's Costs is continued to April 16, 2014 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 3, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2014 Continued To May-13-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Eric Lightman, Esq. for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to MAY-13-2014 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Mtn For Attorney Fees As Prevailing Party
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ERIC LIGHTMAN OF THE LAW OFFICES OF SVETLANA M. SHIRINOVA, TEL. NO. 942-0703 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ROBERT GENTINO, TEL. NO. (818) 509-7272 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT WHITTIER ENTERPRISES, LLC. BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF SEMEYON GOFMAN'S Motion For Attorney Fees As Prevailing Party is Granted. Plaintiff is the prevailing party under CCP sec. 1032. Therefore, Plaintiff is entitled to recover attorney's fees provided for by statute under CCP sec. 1033.5(a)(10). Pursuant to Doran v. North State Grocery ((2006) 137 Cal.App.4th 484), Plaintiff is not entitled to recover attorney's fees under the Labor Code because the plain language of the statutes requires a determination of liability. However, the plain language of Govt. Code sec. 12965(b) does not require such a showing. Under Govt. Code sec. 12965(b), the Court is given discretion to award reasonable attorney's fees to the prevailing party. Defendant shall pay Plaintiff reasonable costs and attorney's fees in the amount of $5,000. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/AR)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Mtn For Attorney Fees As Prevailing Party
Off Calendar Jan-08-2014 Continued To Feb-03-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ROBERT GENTINO, ESQ., 818.509.7272, FOR DEFENDANT WHITTIER ENTERPRISE, LLC; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SEMEYON GOFMAN'S MOTION For Attorney Fees As Prevailing Party IS Continued to February 3, 2014, to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B.
